title: ophrys tenthredinifera var. dimidiata
side_effects: Ophrys tenthredinifera var. dimidiata can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, diarrhea, and headaches due to its toxic compounds. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to vomiting, dizziness, and even liver damage. The plant's sap can also cause skin irritation, rashes, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Additionally, improper use may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
